name: Concrete
title: AI Tools for Concrete Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for concrete companies — qualify leads, draft estimates, and follow up on bids. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500. No contracts.
hero_lede: Driveways, patios, foundations — concrete jobs are higher-ticket and weather-bound. We build the tools that qualify the lead, draft the estimate, and keep the bid warm until the pour is scheduled.
drains: Project inquiries that need scoping before they're worth a site visit
Estimates for pours, flatwork, and decorative jobs built from scratch
Bids that go quiet with no follow-up
Scheduling that shifts constantly with weather

tools.title: Lead-qualifying assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply and the right questions — job type, square footage, timeline, budget range — so site visits go to real projects, not tire-kickers.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: From your site-visit notes, it drafts a clean estimate — materials, labor, prep, finishing — so higher-ticket quotes go out the same day.

tools.title: Bid follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every open bid gets tracked and followed up on a schedule you set, so larger flatwork and decorative jobs don't slip away.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's pours and jobs, crew assignments, materials due, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A concrete company doing driveways, patios, and flatwork.
cases.before: Site visits went to every inquiry; the owner's time leaked into bad-fit estimates.
cases.after: An assistant qualifies each lead before a site visit is booked.
cases.impact: Representative result: site-visit time spent almost entirely on real projects.

cases.context: A concrete contractor with no bid follow-up.
cases.before: Bids went out and sat; no one tracked which had gone cold.
cases.after: Every open bid followed up automatically until the customer decides.
cases.impact: Representative result: more higher-ticket jobs closed from the same lead volume.

faq.q: Can it qualify a concrete lead before a site visit?
faq.a: Yes. It asks about job type, square footage, timeline, and budget range, so your site visits go to projects worth driving out for.

faq.q: Does it handle decorative and structural work?
faq.a: Yes. It scopes flatwork, decorative finishes, and foundation work differently and drafts estimates accordingly.

faq.q: Will it work with my software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you use to track leads, estimates, and schedules.
